prompt: Create a premium conceptual drink advertisement for Malta Guinness, centered on a single cold aluminum can against a seamless saturated golden-orange studio background. The can is upright, front-facing, large in frame, with realistic condensation droplets, a metallic rim, and a warm shadow on the surface below. The label is golden on the upper half and deep dark red on the lower half, featuring a black harp icon above the bold wordmark “Malta” and “GUINNESS” underneath. Across the middle of the can, the label appears torn open horizontally like thick paper, with curled ripped edges extending left and right; inside the tear is a glowing cinematic scene of one athletic runner silhouette sprinting through dust toward a radiant sunset, symbolizing inner power and stamina. Use dramatic golden backlight rays from inside the can, high-end FMCG photography, luxury still-life styling, sharp product detail, clean minimalist composition, and Apple-level commercial polish. Include exactly 5 visible text elements: 1) top headline “nourishment that strengthens” with “strengthens” in bold, 2) main product wordmark “Malta”, 3) brand text “GUINNESS”, 4) lower label line “VITALITY · GOODNESS · ENERGY” plus small “NON ALCOHOLIC MALT DRINK”, and 5) bottom tagline “real strength starts within” with “within” in bold. Keep typography modern, dark brown/black, centered, and spacious. The emotional concept should be real strength starts within; the drink type should read as non alcoholic malt drink. Avoid extra cans, extra athletes, clutter, hands, ice cubes, water splashes, or additional text.
